passives.desc:
Reveal body when the Fairy Part is broken
All Buffs and Debuffs expire when the Body hides again
passives.name: Uncovered Abyss

passives.desc:
When the Body is broken:
- Fairy will have 60% of its max HP upon restoration
- Core heals +20 more HP with Skill effects
passives.name: Broken Stump

passives.desc:
Turn Start: based on the number of units in the Encounter, inflict [FairyCharm] on Sinners with the slowest Speed
Number of [FairyCharm] units increases every time the Fairy Part is restored
passives.name: Charmed

passives.desc:
Cannot damage Core HP by damaging the Fairy
A certain Skill gains Atk Weight based on the number of [FairyCharm] units
passives.name: Leading Lure

passives.desc: Fairy gains 30% increased max HP with each restoration
passives.name: Evolving Lure

passives.desc: When the Fairy is killed, all Identities gain 5 [Breath] and +2 [Breath] Count next turn
passives.name: Fairy Dust

passives.desc: Use more powerful Skills after the Fairy is restored for the second time
passives.name: Increased Aggression - Partial Deterrence Release

skills.desc:
[CantDuel]
Prioritizes Sinners with [FairyCharm]
This Skill's Atk Weight = Number of Sinners with [FairyCharm]
skills.name: Snagged Lure

descs:
[SuperCoin]
[OnSucceedAttack] Deal +5% damage for every [Burst] on target (max 100%)

skills.desc: [DefeatDuel] Deal -80% damage and damage dealt by this Skill cannot Stagger the target
skills.name: Infusing Stems

skills.desc:
If target has 5+ [Burst], deal +100% damage
[DefeatDuel] Deal -80% damage and damage dealt by this Skill cannot Stagger the target
skills.name: Uncovered Abyss

skills.desc:
[CantDuel]
Cannot be Staggered before using this Skill
Prioritizes Sinners with [FairyCharm]
This Skill's Atk Weight = Number of Sinners with [FairyCharm]
skills.name: Snagged Lure

passives.desc:
Starting from turn 2, this unit summons 4 random Dimensions and hides
- When all Parts are Staggered, this effect activates next turn
- Cannot be Staggered while hidden inside a 'Dimensional Rift'.
passives.name: Dimensional Escape

passives.desc:
When all 'Dimensional Rifts' are broken, this unit voluntarily emerges from a 'Dimensional Rift' next turn
Afterward, this unit loses 5 [Charge] Count and all of its Parts' Stagger Thresholds are raised by 30
passives.name: Trapped Dimensional Escape

passives.desc:
At 60% or less Core HP, end turn and gain a new pattern
- Deactivate "Dimensional Escape" Passive
- Deactivate "Trapped Dimensional Escape" Passive
- If neither of its Arms are broken, use a powerful Skill every few turns
passives.name: Forced Dimensional Breach Attempt - Partial Deterrence Release

passives.desc:
When the Blade Part is broken, lose 5 [Charge] Count
At the next Turn End, consume 2 [Charge] Count to restore the broken Blade.

While the Blade Part is broken, gain 2 [AttackDown] at every Turn Start.
passives.name: Regenerate Dimensional Refraction Blade

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Gain +3 [Charge] Count
[DefeatDuel] Consume 2 [Charge] Count
skills.name: Dimensional Slice

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Gain +3 [Charge] Count
[DefeatDuel] Consume 2 [Charge] Count
skills.name: Consecutive Dimensional Slice

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Gain +4 [Charge] Count
[DefeatDuel] Consume 2 [Charge] Count
skills.name: Discharge Byproducts

skills.desc:
At 10+ [Charge] Count, consume 10 [Charge] Count to gain Clash Power +5 and deal +100% damage
At less than 10 [Charge] Count, consume 100 Core HP. Deal +80% damage
This unit's HP cannot drop to 0 due to this Skill's effect
[DefeatDuel] Gain the following effects:
- Gain 2 [Paralysis]
- Deal -80% damage
- This Skill cannot Stagger the target
- Does not activate [Burst] on target
skills.name: Rip Space

skills.desc: [WhenUse] Gain +1 [Charge] Count
skills.name: Prepared Retribution

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] If the main target has [DimensionRift], deal +10% damage
[DefeatDuel] Consume 2 [Charge] Count
skills.name: Vomit Byproducts

skills.desc:
Can Clash with this Skill regardless of Speed; cannot be Staggered before using this Skill
[DefeatDuel]
- Gain 2 [ResultReduction] and 1 [Paralysis]
- Deal -90% damage and damage dealt by this Skill cannot Stagger the target
Gain 1 Clash Power for every Dimension effect on self
Deal +10% for every Dimension effect on self
skills.name: High-speed Rip Space

skills.desc: If this 'Dimensional Rift' remains, deal +10% damage

passives.desc:
Upon death, all Skills are cancelled for the turn
Gain 10 [SelfCharge] when the effect above activates
passives.name: Living Nerves - Partial Deterrence Release

passives.desc: Every 5 turns, gains a Shield equal to the head's HP
passives.name: Undying Persistence

passives.desc:
After using 'Coil Up', if the Shield is exhausted, spend all [SelfCharge]
All parts become Staggered next turn
passives.name: Terminated Persistence

skills.desc:
[StartBattle] Gain 2 [SelfCharge]
[WhenUse] At 5+ [SelfCharge], Base Power +2
[DefeatDuel] Lose 1 [SelfCharge]
skills.name: Bite

skills.desc:
[StartBattle] Gain 2 [SelfCharge]
[WhenUse] At 5+ [SelfCharge], Coin Power +1
[DefeatDuel] Lose 1 [SelfCharge]
skills.name: Tail Poke

skills.desc:
[StartBattle] Gain 3 [SelfCharge]
[WhenUse] At 5+ [SelfCharge], Base Power +2
[DefeatDuel] Lose 1 [SelfCharge]

[WhenUse] At 5+ [SelfCharge], Coin Power +1

[StartBattle] Gain 1 [SelfCharge]
If target has [Paralysis], deal +30% damage
skills.name: Electric Discharge

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] If target has [ElectricStorage], deal 40% of final damage dealt as fixed damage

skills.desc:
At more than 7 [SelfCharge], deal +10% damage for every excess [SelfCharge] past 7 (max 120%)
[WhenUse] Lose all [SelfCharge] on self; if this unit lost 10+ [SelfCharge], gain Clash Power +5
[DefeatDuel] This Attack Skill deals 0 damage
skills.name: High-voltage Electric Discharge

skills.desc:
[StartBattle] The Head Part gains Shield by its current HP
[EndBattle] If the Head Part has Shield, gain 10 [SelfCharge] next turn
skills.name: Coil Up

skills.desc: Prioritizes targets with the least HP If target has [Paralysis], deal +50% damage If target has used a Defense Skill, deal -100% damage Base Power +1 for every [SelfCharge] [WhenUse] Lose 1 [SelfCharge] [EndSkill] If it was an Unopposed Attack, lose 1 [SelfCharge] - If the target attacked by this Skill used a Defense Skill, lose 1 more [SelfCharge]
skills.name: Wriggling Head

skills.desc: Prioritizes targets with the least HP If target has [Paralysis], deal +50% damage If target has used a Defense Skill, deal -100% damage Base Power +1 for every [SelfCharge] [WhenUse] Lose 1 [SelfCharge] [EndSkill] If it was an Unopposed Attack, lose 1 [SelfCharge] - If the target attacked by this Skill used a Defense Skill, lose 1 more [SelfCharge]
skills.name: Wriggling Tail

passives.desc:
If an Arm is Part Broken, convert the Coins on the remaining Arm's Skills to [SuperCoin]s, and they gain +1 Atk Weight
- When using a Skill affected by this effect, gain 1 [RapidGrowthApple]
passives.name: Searching Arm - Partial Deterrence Release

passives.desc:
If this unit has Roots, gain 1 [HowDareYouApple] after its Fruit Part is hit

At 4 [HowDareYouApple], use a powerful Skill that inflicts powerful negative effects

If this unit does not have Roots, neither gain nor lose [HowDareYouApple]
When the Fruit Part gets broken, lose [HowDareYouApple]
passives.name: Ebony Queen - Partial Deterrence Release

passives.desc:
When the Fruit is destroyed, all parts are inflicted with 2 Fragile.
The Fruit regenerates after 1 turn.
passives.name: An Apple’s Twilight

passives.desc:
Turn Start: inflict 2 [Binding] on all enemies
This lasts until the Roots are broken
passives.name: Entangling Roots

passives.desc:
The Roots Part gains 3 [Enhancement] for every unbroken Arm Part
Does not gain this effect if the Roots are broken
passives.name: One Sole Root

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] At 5+ ([Laceration] + [Burst]) on target, Base Power +5
[WhenUse] If this unit has [HowDareYouApple], gain +2 Atk Weight
skills.name: Bring Me Snow White.

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Coin Power +2 for every 4 ([Laceration] + [Burst]) on target (max 4)
[WhenUse] If this unit has [HowDareYouApple], gain +2 Atk Weight
[DefeatDuel] Gain the following effects:
- Gain 2 [Paralysis]
- Deal -80% damage
- This Skill cannot Stagger the target
- Does not activate [Burst] on target
skills.name: Such Insolence!

skills.desc: [WhenUse] Coin Power +2 for every 3 ([Laceration] + [Burst]) on target (max 4)

skills.desc:
[DefeatDuel] Gain the following effects:
- Gain 1 [Paralysis]
- Deal -80% damage
- This Skill cannot Stagger the target
- Does not activate [Burst] on target

skills.desc:
This Skill does not deal damage
[WhenUse] Consume all [HowDareYouApple] on self and Reuse its Coins by [HowDareYouApple] Stack consumed (max 4)
[DefeatDuel] This Skill does not activate [Burst] on target
